mapper.select:
SELECT distinct b.bom_code, m.mat_code, m.mat_name, m.mat_class, b.use_amount, b.note, p.prod_code, p.prod_name, p.unit
FROM bom b JOIN mat_common m ON b.mat_code = m.mat_code JOIN prod_common p ON b.prod_code = p.prod_code
WHERE p.prod_code = #{prodCode}
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(b.bom_code , 5))

SELECT p.prod_code, p.prod_name, p.unit
FROM prod_common p
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(p.prod_code , 6 ))

SELECT mat_code, mat_class, mat_name, standard, unit, safetystock
FROM mat_common
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(mat_code , 5))

SELECT 'BOM-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(bom_code, 5))) + 1, 1)
FROM bom
WHERE bom_code LIKE 'BOM-%'

SELECT mat_code, mat_class, mat_name, standard, unit, safetystock
FROM mat_common
WHERE mat_name = #{matName}
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(mat_code , 5 ))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BOM-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(bom_code, 5))) + 1, 1)
FROM bom
WHERE bom_code LIKE 'BOM-%'
INSERT INTO bom ( bom_code, mat_code, use_amount, note, prod_code ) VALUES ( #{bomCode}, #{matCode}, #{useAmount}, #{note}, #{prodCode} )
mapper.select:
SELECT m.mat_code, m.mat_name, m.mat_class, m.standard, m.unit, m.safetystock
FROM mat_common m
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(m.mat_code , 5))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'MAT-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(mat_code, 5))) + 1, 1)
FROM mat_common
WHERE mat_code LIKE 'MAT-%'
INSERT INTO mat_common ( mat_code, mat_name, mat_class, unit, standard, safetystock) VALUES ( #{matCode}, #{matName}, #{matClass}, #{unit}, #{standard}, #{safetystock})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT m.mat_code, m.mat_name, m.mat_class, m.standard, m.unit, m.safetystock
FROM mat_common m
AND mat_name LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(m.mat_code , 5))

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_code, c.client_name, c.client_type, c.tel, c.address, c.client_manager
FROM client c
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(client_code , 8))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'CLIENT-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(client_code, 8))) + 1, 1)
FROM client
WHERE client_code LIKE 'CLIENT-%'
INSERT INTO client ( client_code, client_name, client_type, tel, address, client_manager) VALUES ( #{clientCode}, #{clientName}, #{clientType}, #{tel}, #{address}, #{clientManager})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_code, c.client_name, c.client_type, c.tel, c.address, c.client_manager
FROM client c
AND client_name LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{managerVO.keyword}) || '%'
AND client_manager LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(c.client_code , 8))

SELECT p.prod_name, p.unit, p.standard, p.prod_code
FROM prod_common p
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(p.prod_code ,6))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PROD-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(prod_code, 6))) + 1, 1)
FROM prod_common
WHERE prod_code LIKE 'PROD-%'
INSERT INTO prod_common ( prod_code, prod_name, unit, standard)
VALUES ( #{prodCode}, #{prodName}, #{unit}, #{standard})
mapper.select:
SELECT f.fac_code, f.fac_name, f.manufacture_date, f.install_date, f.inspect_cycle, f.fac_status, f.image, f.upload_path, f.fac_class_code, f.date_check
FROM fac f
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(f.fac_code , 5))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'FAC-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(fac_code, 5))) + 1, 1)
FROM fac
WHERE fac_code LIKE 'FAC-%'
INSERT INTO fac ( fac_code, fac_name, fac_class_code, manufacture_date, install_date, inspect_cycle, image, upload_path, date_check, fac_status)
VALUES ( #{facCode}, #{facName}, #{facClassCode}, #{manufactureDate}, sysdate, #{inspectCycle}, #{image}, #{uploadPath}, sysdate, #{facStatus})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.prod_code, p.prod_name, p.unit
FROM prod_common p
AND UPPER(prod_name) LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND UPEER(prod_name) LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(p.prod_code , 6 ))

SELECT DISTINCT f.fac_code, f.fac_name, f.manufacture_date, f.install_date, f.inspect_cycle, f.fac_status, f.image, f.upload_path, f.fac_class_code
FROM fac f
AND UPPER(fac_code) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{managerVO.keyword}) || '%'
AND fac_name LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{managerVO.keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(f.fac_code,5))

SELECT DISTINCT p.prod_name, p.unit, p.standard, p.prod_code
FROM prod_common p
AND UPPER(prod_code) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{managerVO.keyword}) || '%'
AND prod_name LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND unit LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(p.prod_code , 6))

SELECT DISTINCT t.test_code, t.test_name, t.test_item_unit, t.note
FROM test t
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(t.test_code, 6))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEST-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_code, 6))) + 1, 1)
FROM test
WHERE test_code LIKE 'TEST-%'
INSERT INTO test ( test_code, test_name, test_item_unit, note)
VALUES ( #{testCode}, #{testName}, #{testItemUnit}, #{note})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT t.test_code, t.test_name, t.test_item_unit, t.note
FROM test t
AND test_name LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND test_item_unit LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(t.test_code, 6))

SELECT distinct p.proc_code, p.proc_name, p.note, f.fac_class_code, p.proc_class_code
FROM proc p JOIN fac f ON p.fac_class_code = f.fac_class_code
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(p.proc_code , 6))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PROC-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(proc_code, 6))) + 1, 1)
FROM proc
WHERE proc_code LIKE 'PROC-%'
INSERT INTO proc ( proc_code, proc_name, proc_class_code, fac_class_code, note)
VALUES (#{procCode}, #{procName}, #{procClassCode}, #{facClassCode}, #{note} )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.proc_code, p.proc_name, p.note, f.fac_class_code, p.proc_class_code
FROM proc p JOIN fac f ON p.fac_class_code = f.fac_class_code
AND UPPER(proc_name) LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND proc_class_code LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(p.proc_code , 6))

SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('PC', 'FD')

SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('PC', 'FD')

SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name
FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('MD')

SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name
FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('FD', 'FS')

SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name
FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('AC')
